loom.description: Loom autonomous orchestrator. Exposes loom_next_step, loom_checkpoint, loom_heartbeat, loom_get_state, and loom_abort. The master Copilot session calls these tools to drive the WORKFLOW_GITHUB.md playbook without human intervention. Run 'loom start' from this workspace before the session begins.

context7.description: Fetches live, version-accurate documentation for Go stdlib, github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go, google/go-github, and modernc.org/sqlite. Prevents the coding agent from using outdated APIs.
